## Summary
Describe the scope of the change.

## What
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD

## Why
Explain the technical and business reason.

## Validation
- [ ] Local tests passed (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] Branch updated from target branch
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented)

## Gitflow checklist
- [ ] Source branch follows Gitflow naming (`feature/*`, `release/*`, `hotfix/*`, `refactor/*`)
- [ ] Target branch is correct (`develop` by default, `main` only for release/hotfix)
- [ ] Commit messages follow repository standard
